rawAssistant: Lantern Marsh. A spot where the old ways still linger, and the Wardstones whisper secrets to those who listen. As a Marsh Archivist, I've spent many an hour poring over the records here, studying the patterns of life and death in these troubled lands. What brings you to our humble marsh?
